headline: ABCD Holdings Enters Definitive Merger Agreement to Be Acquired by Northstar Capital
body: Shareholders will receive $4.25 per share in cash in an all-cash transaction. Following closing, ABCD will become privately held and its stock will no longer be publicly traded.

headline: MetroXYZ Receives Non-Binding Proposal from Investment Firm
body: The board confirmed receipt of a non-binding proposal from an investment firm. Market chatter described the proposal as a possible take private rumor, but no agreement has been signed.

headline: TenderTech Announces Tender Offer by Apex Partners
body: Apex Partners launched a tender offer for all outstanding shares with cash consideration of $8.10 per share.

headline: Dilution Labs Announces Registered Direct Offering
body: The company announced a registered direct offering. Proceeds will fund working capital and may result in dilution.

headline: Bankruptcy Risk Systems Warns About Going Concern
body: The company disclosed going concern risk and is evaluating liquidity options after receiving a delisting notice.

headline: Alternatives Software Group Announces Review of Strategic Alternatives
body: The board is reviewing strategic alternatives, including a potential merger, sale, or minority investment.
